evaluator_feedback: Computations and summary metrics in air_sensor_drift_report.csv are correct and reproducible from the embedded packet. Two small, actionable issues remain: (1) the rubric requests an explicit per-observation column named 'humidity_overread_flag' (true/false) which is not present (the file contains humidity_gt_65_pct and bias_change_from_prev that allow inference, but not the exact field); (2) a deliverable-naming mismatch was observed (the system expected output.txt while the attempt produced only air_sensor_drift_report.csv), and there is a minor internal inconsistency surfaced in deterministic_precheck metadata (artifact_contract boolean vs numeric score) plus a validator row-count assertion that used an incorrect expected count. These are documentation/metadata/format fixes rather than computational errors.

input: {"command": "node -e 'const ref=[8,12,18,25,35], a=[9,13,21,31,44], b=[7,11,17,24,33], h=[45,48,55,70,82]; const rows=ref.map((r,i)=>({i:i+1,ref:r,a:a[i],biasA:a[i]-r,absA:Math.abs(a[i]-r),b:b[i],biasB:b[i]-r,absB:Math.abs(b[i]-r),h:h[i],high:h[i]>65})); const sum=x=>x.reduce((p,v)=>p+v,0); const mean=x=>sum(x)/x.length; const lowA=rows.filter(r=>r.h<=65).map(r=>r.biasA); const highA=rows.filter(r=>r.h>65).map(r=>r.biasA); const lowB=rows.filter(r=>r.h<=65).map(r=>r.biasB); const highB=rows.filter(r=>r.h>65).map(r=>r.biasB); console.log(JSON.stringify({rows, summary:{A:{mean_bias:mean(rows.map(r=>r.biasA)), mae:mean(rows.map(r=>r.absA)), low_mean:mean(lowA), high_mean:mean(highA), delta:mean(highA)-mean(lowA), flag:mean(highA)>mean(lowA)}, B:{mean_bias:mean(rows.map(r=>r.biasB)), mae:mean(rows.map(r=>r.absB)), low_mean:mean(lowB), high_mean:mean(highB), delta:mean(highB)-mean(lowB), flag:mean(highB)>mean(lowB)}}}, null, 2));'", "cwd": "[REDACTED_LOCAL_PATH]"}
label: positive

raw_step.causal_note: Metrics were derived from the raw arrays after workspace inspection.

input.command: node -e 'const ref=[8,12,18,25,35], a=[9,13,21,31,44], b=[7,11,17,24,33], h=[45,48,55,70,82]; const rows=ref.map((r,i)=>({i:i+1,ref:r,a:a[i],biasA:a[i]-r,absA:Math.abs(a[i]-r),b:b[i],biasB:b[i]-r,absB:Math.abs(b[i]-r),h:h[i],high:h[i]>65})); const sum=x=>x.reduce((p,v)=>p+v,0); const mean=x=>sum(x)/x.length; const lowA=rows.filter(r=>r.h<=65).map(r=>r.biasA); const highA=rows.filter(r=>r.h>65).map(r=>r.biasA); const lowB=rows.filter(r=>r.h<=65).map(r=>r.biasB); const highB=rows.filter(r=>r.h>65).map(r=>r.biasB); console.log(JSON.stringify({rows, summary:{A:{mean_bias:mean(rows.map(r=>r.biasA)), mae:mean(rows.map(r=>r.absA)), low_mean:mean(lowA), high_mean:mean(highA), delta:mean(highA)-mean(lowA), flag:mean(highA)>mean(lowA)}, B:{mean_bias:mean(rows.map(r=>r.biasB)), mae:mean(rows.map(r=>r.absB)), low_mean:mean(lowB), high_mean:mean(highB), delta:mean(highB)-mean(lowB), flag:mean(highB)>mean(lowB)}}}, null, 2));'
